articles.headline: Co-packaged optics positioned as a key interconnect for AI data centers
articles.summary: A new market forecast says co-packaged optics is moving toward mainstream deployment in AI data centers as operators seek higher bandwidth and lower energy per bit. This is important for businesses exposed to cloud costs, AI infrastructure supply chains, and semiconductor demand because it points to the next wave of networking investment behind AI scaling.

articles.headline: Tech stocks rebound as Trump heads to China and AI tensions stay in focus
articles.summary: Bloomberg reported a tech-stock rebound amid inflation data, with AI and semiconductor trade tensions still central to market sentiment. The China trip and chip discussions matter to businesses because export controls, supply chain access, and geopolitics can quickly affect hardware availability, pricing, and capital spending plans.

articles.headline: Tech stocks rally as Cisco surges and Cerebras jumps on Nasdaq debut
articles.summary: Wall Street’s tech rally continued as Cisco rose sharply after stronger earnings and Cerebras posted a strong first-day performance. The move signals ongoing investor confidence in AI and networking infrastructure, which matters for companies planning cloud spend, AI rollouts, and vendor selection.
